title: Unlocked Typing
description: This mod allows you to use Minecraft’s classic color and formatting codes (§) in every text input, chat, world names, anvils, books, signs, and more!
body:
![Banner](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/UNLOCKED_TYPING/MP_UNLOCKED_TYPING_Header.webp) With Unlocked Typing, you can freely use § color and format codes in text boxes that normally block them, including: - 🪧 Signs. - 📘 Books and Quills. - ⚒ Anvils. - 🌍 World Names. - 💬 Chat. Supported color and formatting codes include: §0-§f for colors and §l, §o, §n, §m, §k, §r for formatting. ### Do you need a server to play with your friends?

For exceptional server hosting services, look no further than **[BisectHosting](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin)**. Of course, you can install all the mods or modpacks you want, and their support team is always available to help you. **[With the code "Lupin" you will get a 25% discount! Click here!](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin)** ![Summary](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/UNLOCKED_TYPING/MP_UNLOCKED_TYPING_Description.webp) With Unlocked Typing allows you to freely use color and formatting codes (§) in text boxes that normally block them, including signs, books and quills, anvils, world names, and chat. It supports color codes §0–§f and formatting codes §l, §o, §n, §m, §k, and §r, giving you full freedom to customize your text with unique colors and styles. ![FAQ](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/UNLOCKED_TYPING/MP_UNLOCKED_TYPING_Faq.webp) ### Does it work on servers? ### Sure! Remember that the best way to play with mods and friends is with BisectHosting, and by **[clicking on this link you can get a 25% discount](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin).** ### Can this mod be used in modpacks? ### Of course! As long as it is published only on Modrinth or CurseForge. Uploading it to any other platform would be violating our rights and is not allowed at all. However, we are really grateful if you consider adding it to your Modrinth or CurseForge modpack. If you need any small changes or have any questions, contact us! ![Screenshots](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/UNLOCKED_TYPING/MP_UNLOCKED_TYPING_Screenshots.webp) ![Screenshots 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Mi8k2ip4/images/d8e37f899ef8e8fe4d53fcd642975d1145284553.jpeg) ![Screenshots 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Mi8k2ip4/images/854a092f7162bffbb5db7b94714d5af4ee5eed1a.jpeg) ![Screenshots 3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Mi8k2ip4/images/c4182095370afc6cca6907d2736a2cd0f44d0478.jpeg) [![DISCORD](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/MultiRecipe/BH_Lupin_Discord.webp)](https://discord.gg/X8VY5WMbe4) .
